ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the dataset */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher of the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Relevant keywords for search and filtering purposes */,
  "themes" TEXT /* Themes or topics categorizing the dataset */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes or megabytes */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the dataset (e.g., public, restricted, confidential) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_descriptions" (
  "description_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each description */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the description belongs to */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the description */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset in the specified language */,
  "description_type" TEXT /* Type of description (e.g., short, long) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("description_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_descriptions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "identifiers" (
  "identifier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each identifier */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the identifier belongs to */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Value of the identifier */,
  "identifier_type" TEXT /* Type of the identifier (e.g., URI, DOI) */,
  "identifier_scheme" TEXT /* Scheme or standard used for the identifier (e.g., DOI, UUID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("identifier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_identifiers_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public service */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the public service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the public service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of the public service (e.g., API, web service, data portal) */,
  "endpoint" TEXT /* URL or endpoint of the public service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_services" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset linked to the public service */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the public service linked to the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_services_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_services_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES public_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publisher */,
  "organization_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., government, academic, private) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the publisher (e.g., email, phone number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "landing_pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each landing page */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the landing page belongs to */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the landing page */,
  "page_type" TEXT /* Type of landing page (e.g., dataset landing page, service landing page) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landing_pages_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Metadata of the dataset at the specified version */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Brief description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
